results.description: Audit file committed with binding table
results.evidence: docs/audits/2026-04-16-contract-local-binding-table.md committed as 351c13c. 44 lines of additions covering 9 distinct contract field bindings.

results.description: Every remote binding has an explicit local substitute OR is flagged as out-of-scope
results.evidence: Table rows: subscribe_topics WIRED (runtime_local.py:636), publish_topics WIRED (runtime_local.py:680), consumer_group PARTIAL (documented exception), dlq_topics GAP/documented exception, state_store GAP (Task 3 closes), llm_client OUT-OF-SCOPE, db_client OUT-OF-SCOPE, terminal_event WIRED (compatible with OMN-8940 synth), state_machine HANDLER-INTERNAL. No binding left unclassified.

results.description: Reviewers can use table to verify Tasks 3-8 don't invent undocumented deps
results.evidence: Final section 'Reviewer cross-reference' instructs reviewers to flag any task referencing deps NOT in this table as undocumented substrate assumption.
